title: Dutch Hash with Charred Fries
description: A hearty breakfast dish featuring crispy fries and a rich hash.

ingredients.name: Charred Fries
ingredients.notes: preferably leftover or made from scratch

instructions: 2. Place the charred fries on a baking sheet and toast in the oven for 5-7 minutes, or until crispy.
3. In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat.
4. Add the hash to the skillet and cook until lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
5. Push the hash to one side of the skillet.
6. Crack the eggs into the other side of the skillet and scramble until cooked through.
7. Stir the eggs into the hash.
8. Add the toasted fries to the skillet and stir to combine.
9. If using cheese, sprinkle it over the top and stir until melted.
10. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
